name: Salzburger Nockerls
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks until thick and light.
2. Gradually add flour, beating until smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add sugar, beating stiff peaks.
4. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the yolk-flour mixture.
5. Melt butter in an ovenproof frying pan over low heat.
6. Spoon batter into the pan, creating two large mounds.
7. Cook for one minute on the stovetop.
8. Transfer to a preheated 325°F (165°C) oven and bake for 7 minutes or until lightly golden.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and shaved chocolate.
10. Serve immediately.
